patch.value: Feature scope: public README simplification, docs index, usage quickstart, agent guide, command reference, extension/SDK doc cleanup, release doc cleanup, and tracker cross-links.
Define and publish a progressive documentation structure that keeps the README short while moving detailed user and agent guidance into focused docs.

Public docs have a clear entry point; each detailed page exposes a short agent preamble; links are relative and GitHub-compatible; pm-3042 is referenced from the docs and docs are linked back to the task.
